sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Hello World', 'A simple string example'), (2, 'Sample Token', 'Another example string');
SELECT id, hasToken(name, 'Hello') ? 'Contains Hello' : 'Does not contain Hello' AS token_check FROM test_table;
SELECT id, hasToken(description, 'example') ? 'Present' : 'Absent' AS token_check, hasToken(name, 'NotExist') ? 1 : 0 AS non_existing_token FROM test_table;

SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_table WHERE hasToken(name, 'Hello')) AS hello_count, hasToken(description, (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)) ? 1 : 0 AS description_match FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, name, description FROM test_table;
SELECT id, hasToken(COALESCE(NULL, description), 'Token') ? 'Token present' : 'Token absent' AS null_test FROM temp_table;
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN hasToken(name, 'Token') THEN 'Is Token' ELSE 'No Token' END) AS token_status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, hasToken(name, 'Sample') ? hasToken(description, 'simple') ? 'Complexity Check Passed' : 'Only Sample' : 'No Sample' AS nested_check FROM test_table;
SELECT id, hasToken(NULLIF(name, ''), 'Hello') ? 1 : hasToken(name, 'World') ? 1 : 0 AS multi_condition_check FROM test_table;
